title: Military Sealift Command
description:
sealiftcommand.com zoominfo.com/c/military-sealift-command/149045906 ITAR documentation, personal data, cargo manifests—including ESSM shipments—vessel blueprints, and both disclosed and undisclosed information. U.S. Navy's Military Sealift Command (MSC).
It is the primary provider of ocean transportation and global logistics support for the U.S. military, operating approximately 125 ships daily worldwide.
